caption: A football game takes place on a sunny day on a green field with white yard markers. The scene features players in white and black uniforms, with a scoreboard at the top showing "3rd & 4", "0:52", and ":17". On-screen text includes "OFFENSE AT WORK" and "EXO". In the upper frames, a player in a black jersey with the number 88 is highlighted by a circular graphic with an "X" and the text "EXO" below it. A small inset window in the bottom left of the frames shows a blond man with headphones. As the action progresses, the camera zooms in on the players. A player in a white jersey with the number 7 tackles the player in the black number 88 jersey, causing the player in black to fall backward onto the turf. A player in a white jersey stands nearby, watching the tackle.
